prompt: Rank every customer by total spending and show what percentage of their purchases were electronics vs furniture vs office products

parts.content: Rank every customer by total spending and show what percentage of their purchases were electronics vs furniture vs office products
I'll help you rank customers by total spending and break down their purchase percentages by product category. Let me start by getting the schema information.
Now let me fetch all the necessary data to analyze customer spending by category:

parts.name: execute_typescript

parts.content:
Perfect! Here's the ranked list of customers by total spending with their purchase breakdown by category:

| Rank | Customer Name | Total Spent | Electronics | Furniture | Office Products |

| 5 | Grace Kim | $449.98 | 11.11% | 88.89% | 0% |
| 6 | David Brown | $344.90 | 78.27% | 0% | 0% |
| 7 | Alice Johnson | $249.96 | 100.00% | 0% | 0% |
| 8 | Frank Lee | $209.97 | 100.00% | 0% | 0% |
| 9 | Jack Wilson | $179.97 | 50.00% | 50.00% | 0% |
| 10 | Ivy Chen | $119.97 | 58.34% | 0% | 0% |

**Key Insights:**
- **Top spender:** Carol Williams with $639.93, primarily focused on Furniture (62.51%)
- **Strongest Electronics buyers:** Alice Johnson and Frank Lee (100% of purchases), followed by David Brown (78.27%)
- **Furniture enthusiasts:** Grace Kim (88.89%), Eva Martinez (86.41%)
- **Office Products:** No customers purchased office products in this dataset
- **Top 3 customers** account for 1,694.76 out of 4,704.40 total spending (36% of all revenue)
